summary: Completed testing for iteration 20: Subscription feature updates. All backend tests (12/12) passed. Frontend verified: Step 5 mandatory card registration (skip button removed), Subscription success page with admin approval notice, Business dashboard subscription tab working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/business/register - Creates business with subscription_status='none' and status='pending'
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/subscribe - Creates Stripe Checkout session with valid URL
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/subscribe - Returns 401 without auth
Backend: GET /api/businesses/me/subscription/status - Returns 'none' for new business with current_period_end and cancel_at_period_end fields
Backend: GET /api/businesses/me/subscription/status - Returns 401 without auth
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/subscription/cancel - Returns 400 when no subscription exists
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/subscription/cancel - Returns 401 without auth
Backend: GET /api/businesses/me/dashboard - Includes 'subscription' object in response
Backend: GET /api/businesses - Only shows approved businesses with active/trialing subscription
Backend: GET /api/businesses/featured - Only shows approved businesses with active/trialing subscription
Backend: New business NOT visible in search (pending + no subscription)
Backend: GET /api/health - Server healthy
Frontend: /business/register - Step 5 has NO 'skip-subscription-button' (verified via code grep)
Frontend: /business/register - Step 5 has NO 'Hacerlo después' text (verified via code grep)
Frontend: /business/subscription/success - Shows 'Tu tarjeta fue registrada correctamente'
Frontend: /business/subscription/success - Shows 'Pendiente de aprobacion' message
Frontend: /business/subscription/success - Shows subscription details ($39 MXN, 30-day trial)
Frontend: /business/subscription/success - Has 'Ir a mi panel' button
Frontend: /business/dashboard - Shows 'Tu negocio está en revisión' alert when status=pending
Frontend: /business/dashboard - Has 'Suscripcion' tab with data-testid='tab-subscription'
Frontend: Business Dashboard subscription tab - Shows 'Estado' with 'Sin suscripcion' badge
Frontend: Business Dashboard subscription tab - Shows 'Precio: $39 MXN / mes'
Frontend: Business Dashboard subscription tab - Shows 'Activar suscripcion' button for businesses without subscription

mocked_api_note.Stripe: Using sk_test_emergent (test mode) with Emergent proxy - Real Stripe Checkout URLs generated

seed_data_creation: Created test business 'DashboardTest Business' via API for frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified all subscription feature updates: (1) Skip button completely removed from Step 5 - code grep confirmed no 'skip-subscription-button' or 'Hacerlo después' exists, (2) SubscriptionSuccessPage shows correct messages including 'Pendiente de aprobacion', (3) Business dashboard subscription tab works with data-testid='tab-subscription', shows status badge, price, and activate button, (4) VISIBLE_BUSINESS_FILTER correctly filters businesses by status=approved AND subscription_status in (active, trialing), (5) Cancel endpoint returns 400 when no subscription. Key data-testids: tab-subscription, subscription-status-badge, activate-subscription-button, cancel-subscription-button, subscribe-button. Note: Step 3 (Documentos) requires INE upload which blocked full registration flow testing in browser - but backend API allows registration without it.
